## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix/...`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat/...`)
- [ ] Documentation update (`docs/...`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor/...`)
- [ ] CI / tooling (`chore/...`)

## PR Checklist

- [ ] My branch is based on `develop` (not `main`)
- [ ] Branch name follows the convention: `feat/issue-{number}-description`
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] TypeScript strict mode passes: `pnpm type-check`
- [ ] Biome linting passes: `pnpm lint`
- [ ] I tested this on Stellar testnet
- [ ] No `any` types introduced
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or mainnet keys
- [ ] PR changes fewer than 400 lines (excluding auto-generated files)
